products.title: COMMERCIAL REVERSE OSMOSIS RO DESALINATION PLANT RO 1500 LPD / 400GPD
products.short_description: Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.
products.description:
Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.

Reverse osmosis works by forcing water through a semi-permeable membrane that filters contaminants down to molecular level — removing dissolved salts, heavy metals, fluoride, chlorine byproducts, pesticides, and a wide spectrum of other contaminants that conventional filtration leaves behind. The result is water comparable to premium bottled water, delivered on demand from your kitchen tap. RO systems require a dedicated drinking tap (included or available separately) and produce a small amount of brine wastewater as part of normal operation.

Installation typically takes 1 to 2 hours and can be DIY for those comfortable with basic plumbing, or carried out by any licensed plumber. The system mounts inside the cabinet under your sink, with the dedicated drinking tap installed in an existing or newly-drilled hole in your sink or benchtop. A drain saddle clamp connects to the existing waste line for the brine drain.

products.title: Inline UF Ultrafiltration Filter Cartridge
products.short_description: Replacement filter cartridge for water filtration systems. Compatible with standard housings used across major water filter brands.
products.description:
Replacement filter cartridge for water filtration systems. Compatible with standard housings used across major water filter brands.

Replacement frequency depends on your water quality and usage. Most household applications see 6 to 12 months of service life from each cartridge, though high-sediment water or high-flow households may require more frequent changes. Signs that it's time to replace include: reduced flow rate, return of chlorine taste or odour, or visible discolouration of the cartridge. Always flush new cartridges before drinking the first batch of water.

products.title: Inline Shutoff Ball Valve | Push Fit Quick Connect | 1/4"
products.short_description:
The 1/4" Inline Ball Valve Push Fit is an essential component for managing water flow in reverse osmosis (RO) and other water filtration systems. Its user-friendly design and reliable performance make it a valuable addition to any water purification setup. Key Features:

Easy Installation: The push-fit mechanism allows for quick and tool-free connection to 1/4" tubing, simplifying the installation process. Reliable Flow Control: This inline ball valve provides precise control over water flow, enabling users to start or stop the flow as needed, which is particularly useful during maintenance or filter replacements.
products.description:

Leak-Free Performance: Constructed with high-quality materials, the valve ensures a secure and leak-free connection, maintaining the integrity of your water filtration system.
Versatile Application: Suitable for use in various systems, including reverse osmosis units, fridge dispensers and under-sink systems.

products.title: Tap Thread Adaptor Suitable for Countertop Systems 22mm to 24mm
products.short_description: Tap thread adaptor that converts a 22mm tap thread to a 24mm thread, allowing benchtop water filter diverter valves (which use 24mm) to fit on standard Australian kitchen tap aerator threads (commonly 22mm). Solves the most common compatibility problem with imported countertop water filter systems.
products.description:
## The problem this solves

Most countertop water filter systems are imported and ship with a diverter valve designed for the 24mm aerator thread that's standard in Europe and Asia. But Australian kitchen taps mostly use a 22mm aerator thread. Result: you unbox your new benchtop filter, try to fit the diverter, and discover it doesn't thread on to your tap.

This adaptor is the fix. It's a small brass ring with 22mm internal threads (to screw into your tap aerator socket) and 24mm external threads (for the diverter valve to screw onto). Two-second installation, no tools, no plumber.

## Specifications

- **Internal thread:** 22mm (to fit standard Australian tap aerator socket)
- **External thread:** 24mm (to accept European/Asian diverter valves)
- **Material:** Solid brass with chrome plating
- **Sealing washer:** Included (rubber)

## How to know if you need this

If your benchtop filter system's diverter valve has a thread that **doesn't match your kitchen tap aerator**, you almost certainly need a thread adaptor — and this 22mm-to-24mm size fits the most common case.

Quick check:
1. Unscrew the aerator from the end of your kitchen tap
2. Look at the diverter valve from your filter system
3. If they're different sizes, you need this adaptor (or its 24-to-22 reverse)

## Compatibility

Suitable for virtually all benchtop water filter systems with a 24mm female diverter valve thread. If you're not sure, send us a photo of your tap aerator thread and the diverter valve and we'll confirm the correct adaptor before you order.

products.title: COMMERCIAL REVERSE OSMOSIS RO DESALINATION PLANT RO 3000 LPD / 800 GPD With Pressure Tank
products.short_description: Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.
products.description:
Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.

Reverse osmosis works by forcing water through a semi-permeable membrane that filters contaminants down to molecular level — removing dissolved salts, heavy metals, fluoride, chlorine byproducts, pesticides, and a wide spectrum of other contaminants that conventional filtration leaves behind. The result is water comparable to premium bottled water, delivered on demand from your kitchen tap. RO systems require a dedicated drinking tap (included or available separately) and produce a small amount of brine wastewater as part of normal operation.

Installation typically takes 1 to 2 hours and can be DIY for those comfortable with basic plumbing, or carried out by any licensed plumber. The system mounts inside the cabinet under your sink, with the dedicated drinking tap installed in an existing or newly-drilled hole in your sink or benchtop. A drain saddle clamp connects to the existing waste line for the brine drain.

products.title: 12 Litre Reverse Osmosis Water Holding Tank RO-3.2G, Plastic Rust Free
products.short_description: Pressure tank designed to maintain consistent water pressure across reverse osmosis, booster pump, and water filtration systems. Holding tank for reverse osmosis filtration systems — stores filtered water at pressure for instant delivery when you turn on the tap. Made in Italy with quality construction suitable for drinking water applications.
products.description:
Pressure tank designed to maintain consistent water pressure across reverse osmosis, booster pump, and water filtration systems. Holding tank for reverse osmosis filtration systems — stores filtered water at pressure for instant delivery when you turn on the tap. Made in Italy with quality construction suitable for drinking water applications.

Pressure tanks store filtered water under pressure so it's instantly available when you open the tap — without this, RO systems would produce a slow trickle as the membrane works in real time. Italian-made tanks meet European drinking water standards and are constructed with food-grade bladders rated for direct contact with potable water. Replacement bladders are available separately for tank refurbishment when the original bladder eventually fatigues.

Connects to your filtration system or pump using standard fittings. The tank pre-charge pressure should be set per system requirements before connection. Italian-made tanks ship with factory pre-charge but should be verified before installation.

products.title: RO Water Filter 24v DC Diaphragm Pump Reverse Osmosis Pressure Booster Pump
products.short_description: 24V DC diaphragm booster pump engineered for reverse osmosis systems. Generates up to 125 PSI to drive the RO membrane at full efficiency, with adjustable non-reflux pressure head and automatic bypass at 120 PSI. Genuine TaiWan DengYuan build quality — the OEM unit specified by serious RO system builders. 3/8" NPT ports, low 16.8W power draw.
products.description:
## Why an RO system needs a booster pump

Reverse osmosis membranes only work efficiently above a minimum inlet pressure — typically 60-80 PSI. Australian mains pressure varies widely: outer-suburb properties on long supply runs, properties on tank water, or anywhere with afternoon pressure drop will see RO production fall to a trickle without pressure boosting.

A booster pump installed between the cold-water supply and the RO system inlet lifts incoming pressure to the optimal range, dramatically increasing membrane production rate (often 3-5×) and reducing brine wastewater. For systems used daily, the pump pays for itself in water savings within 12 months.

## Genuine TaiWan DengYuan build

DengYuan is the Taiwan-based OEM that builds diaphragm pumps for many of the major RO system brands. This is their genuine 50GPD pump — not a no-name copy. Better tolerances, longer-lasting diaphragms, and the build quality you need from a part that runs every time someone draws water from the kitchen tap.

## Specifications

- **Type:** Diaphragm booster pump (50GPD rated)
- **Voltage:** 24V DC
- **Power:** 16.8W
- **Inlet pressure:** 30 PSI minimum
- **Working pressure:** 80 PSI
- **Maximum pressure:** 125 PSI
- **Bypass pressure:** 120 PSI ± 10
- **Flow rate at 80 PSI:** ≥0.6 LPM (≥36 LPH)
- **Current at 80 PSI:** ≤0.8A
- **Ports:** 3/8" NPT female
- **Tube connection:** 1/4" (with reducer) or 3/8" direct
- **Head type:** Non-reflux, adjustable
- **Motor:** Permanent magnet DC, internal carbon brush
- **Wetted materials:** Santoprene + Polyamide (food-grade)
- **Liquid temperature:** 75°C maximum

## How it integrates with your RO system

Connect inline between your cold-water supply (after the pre-filter sediment and carbon stages) and the RO membrane housing inlet. A 24V DC power supply (sold separately or included with most RO system kits) provides power. The non-reflux head prevents pressurised RO output from flowing backwards through the pump when the system is idle — important for membrane longevity.

## When you need this pump

- Mains pressure consistently below 60 PSI (test with a $20 gauge from any hardware store)
- RO system on tank water or rainwater
- High-rise buildings on lower floors with restricted pressure
- Anywhere your RO production has slowed noticeably over time
- High-output RO systems (75GPD and above) for full membrane efficiency

products.title: Premium Three Stage Big Blue Whole House Water Filter System
products.short_description: Premium three-stage 20" × 4.5" Big Blue whole-house water filtration system with integrated dual pressure gauges — protecting every tap, shower, and water-using appliance in your home from a single point of entry. Combines GAC, polypropylene sediment, and coconut carbon block filtration with the high-flow Big Blue housing format. Includes housing spanner and mounting frame.
products.description:
## Whole-house filtration done properly

Whole-house filtration is installed at the point where mains water enters your home, treating every drop of water your house uses — drinking, showering, washing, and feeding into appliances. The benefit is comprehensive:

- Protected plumbing (no sediment building up in pipes)
- Longer-lasting hot water systems and washing machines (sediment is the #1 killer of these appliances)
- Chlorine-free showers (better for skin and hair)
- Consistent quality at every tap (no filter taste-test from room to room)
- No need for a separate kitchen drinking-water filter

## Why three stages instead of one or two

**Stage 1 — Polypropylene sediment filter (5-micron):** Captures sand, dirt, rust, and suspended particles before they reach the more expensive downstream stages. Essentially the bouncer at the door — keeps the big stuff out.

**Stage 2 — Granular Activated Carbon (GAC):** Reduces chlorine, taste, odour, and a wide range of organic compounds. Larger surface area than carbon block, better for chlorine removal at high flow rates.

**Stage 3 — Coconut carbon block (CTO):** Final polishing stage that catches anything the GAC missed and gives a finer-grade filtration for taste and odour. Coconut-shell carbon is preferred over coal-based carbon for lower silica leaching.

Three stages doesn't just mean three times the filtration — each stage protects and extends the life of the next. A three-stage system has cartridges that last longer than a single-stage system filtering the same water.

## Why Big Blue size matters

20" × 4.5" Big Blue housings are the high-flow standard for whole-house filtration. Compared to 10" × 2.5" under-sink size:

- **5-8× more filter surface area** = much lower pressure drop
- **5-8× longer cartridge life** = annual cartridge changes instead of quarterly
- **Better for high-demand households** = no pressure loss when multiple taps run
- **Suitable for commercial use** = can handle continuous flow demands

## Dual pressure gauges — why they matter

The dual pressure gauges on this system show inlet pressure (before filtration) and outlet pressure (after filtration). The pressure differential tells you exactly when cartridges need replacing — if the differential exceeds 10-15 PSI, your filters are loaded and need changing. Without gauges, you're guessing based on calendar dates.

## What's included

- 3× 20" × 4.5" Big Blue housings
- 5-micron polypropylene sediment filter (pre-installed)
- GAC granular carbon filter (pre-installed)
- 5-micron coconut carbon block filter (pre-installed)
- 2× pressure gauges (inlet and outlet monitoring)
- White-coated metal mounting frame
- Plastic housing spanner for cartridge changes
- Built-in pressure release valves

## Specifications

- **Stages:** 3
- **Housing size:** 20" × 4.5" (Big Blue)
- **Inlet/outlet:** 1" BSP
- **Cartridges:** GAC + PP sediment + coconut carbon block (all 5-micron)
- **Pressure monitoring:** Dual gauges (inlet + outlet)
- **Approximate dimensions:** 58cm wide × 25cm deep × 77cm tall

## No separate drinking tap needed

Because this system filters water at the point of entry, you can drink directly from any tap in the house without needing a separate kitchen drinking filter. (That said, if you have particular taste preferences or want RO-grade purification for drinking specifically, a dedicated under-sink RO unit can be added downstream.)

## Installation

Installation must be carried out by a licensed plumber. Allow approximately 1-2 hours including bypass valve installation, mounting, and commissioning. Ships from Sydney for fast Australian dispatch.

products.title: COMMERCIAL REVERSE OSMOSIS RO DESALINATION PLANTL RO 3000 LPD / 800 GPD
products.short_description: Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.
products.description:
Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.

Reverse osmosis works by forcing water through a semi-permeable membrane that filters contaminants down to molecular level — removing dissolved salts, heavy metals, fluoride, chlorine byproducts, pesticides, and a wide spectrum of other contaminants that conventional filtration leaves behind. The result is water comparable to premium bottled water, delivered on demand from your kitchen tap. RO systems require a dedicated drinking tap (included or available separately) and produce a small amount of brine wastewater as part of normal operation.

Installation typically takes 1 to 2 hours and can be DIY for those comfortable with basic plumbing, or carried out by any licensed plumber. The system mounts inside the cabinet under your sink, with the dedicated drinking tap installed in an existing or newly-drilled hole in your sink or benchtop. A drain saddle clamp connects to the existing waste line for the brine drain.

Operating at a flow rate of 0.5-1 gallon per minute (GPM), this sterilizer is ideal for point-of-use applications such as drinking water systems, RVs, boats, or other small-scale water filtration setups. Powered by 12VDC, it’s energy-efficient and perfect for off-grid or mobile installations.

What's included:

UV Steriliser Chamber – Compact lamp housing for effective sterilisation.
6W Phillips UV Lamp – Provides up to 9,000 hours of continuous use for reliable water purification.
Quartz Glass Tube – Protects the UV lamp and ensures maximum sterilisation efficiency.
1/4" Quick-Connect Fittings – Easy and secure connections for seamless installation.
12VDC Australian Power Adapter – Ensures efficient and low-energy operation.
Mounting Brackets – Sturdy and durable for secure installation in various setups.

products.title: Drinking Fountain Tap For Bubbler / Cooler Chrome Tap / Faucet
products.short_description: Heavy-duty press-type drinking fountain tap, designed as a direct replacement or spare for commercial water bubblers and water coolers. Push-button operation with adjustable flow rate, 1/4" male thread inlet (the standard fitting on virtually every commercial bubbler in Australia), and chrome-plated brass construction rated for daily public use.
products.description:
## A spare part that actually fits

If you manage a school, gym, sporting club, or public facility with a drinking bubbler, you've probably been through the frustration of trying to source a replacement tap. Imported bubblers often use proprietary fittings, and even standard ones rarely come with replacement-part availability after the warranty expires.

This tap uses the standard 1/4" male thread fitting found across virtually every commercial bubbler on the Australian market — including Enviro Aqua's commercial bubbler range. If you have a tap that's leaking, sticking, or has been vandalised, this is the part you need.

## Built for daily public use

The press-type valve uses a positive-action button rather than a fragile lever. Press to dispense, release to stop — no leaks when idle, no parts that snap off when someone leans on it. The brass body is chrome-plated to resist tarnishing and the daily abuse of public-facility use.

## Adjustable flow control

An internal adjustment screw controls flow rate, letting you dial in the right stream height for your installation. Too high and water sprays past the bowl; too low and users wait around. Once set, it stays set.

## Specifications

- **Type:** Press-button drinking fountain tap
- **Body material:** Chrome-plated brass
- **Inlet thread:** 1/4" BSP male (standard commercial bubbler fitting)
- **Flow control:** Adjustable
- **Suitable for:** Commercial bubblers, water coolers, drinking fountains

## Compatibility

Fits any drinking fountain or water bubbler that uses the industry-standard 1/4" BSP male inlet thread. If you're unsure whether this matches your existing unit, get in touch — we can confirm compatibility from a photo of the existing tap connection.

## Why facility managers buy ahead

When the tap on your bubbler fails, you usually find out at 9am on a Monday with a queue of thirsty users and no working drinking water. Many of our commercial customers keep one or two of these on the shelf as standard maintenance stock — at this price point, it's cheap insurance against an outage.

products.title: 100L Vertical Solar System Water Pressure Tank Expansion Tank with legs
products.short_description: Pressure tank designed to maintain consistent water pressure across reverse osmosis, booster pump, and water filtration systems. Made in Italy with quality construction suitable for drinking water applications.
products.description:
Pressure tank designed to maintain consistent water pressure across reverse osmosis, booster pump, and water filtration systems. Made in Italy with quality construction suitable for drinking water applications.

Pressure tanks store filtered water under pressure so it's instantly available when you open the tap — without this, RO systems would produce a slow trickle as the membrane works in real time. Italian-made tanks meet European drinking water standards and are constructed with food-grade bladders rated for direct contact with potable water. Replacement bladders are available separately for tank refurbishment when the original bladder eventually fatigues.

Connects to your filtration system or pump using standard fittings. The tank pre-charge pressure should be set per system requirements before connection. Italian-made tanks ship with factory pre-charge but should be verified before installation.

products.title: Bladder For 8L Pressure Water Tank, Drinking Water Compatible made in Italy
products.short_description: Genuine replacement bladder for 8-litre pressure water tanks, made in Italy from drinking-water-grade EPDM/butyl rubber compound. Hygienically certified for potable water contact under European Union and US food-safety standards. The right replacement when your existing pressure tank has lost its charge or the bladder has fatigued — far cheaper than replacing the entire tank.
products.description:
## When you need a replacement bladder

Pressure tank bladders eventually fatigue. Symptoms:

- Tank no longer holds pre-charge pressure
- Pump cycles on/off rapidly (no pressure buffer)
- Water comes out the air valve when pressed
- Tank feels noticeably heavy compared to when new
- Visible water at the air valve

Any of these means the bladder is leaking and needs replacement. Whole tanks are expensive — replacing just the bladder is typically a fifth of the cost.

## Why drinking-water-grade matters

The bladder is the only part of a pressure tank that's in continuous contact with your drinking water. Cheap rubber compounds can leach taste, odour, and trace chemicals into the water — particularly when new, but also as they age and break down.

This bladder is **EPDM/butyl rubber** specifically formulated for drinking water applications, with **EU and US hygienic certifications** for direct contact with potable water. It's the bladder material used in commercial water dispenser tanks, RO holding tanks for restaurants, and food-service pressure systems.

## Made in Italy

Italian rubber compound manufacturing has been the European centre for drinking-water-grade elastomers since the 1960s. Italian bladders set the spec; cheaper Asian copies typically use compromised compound formulations to hit a price point.

## Specifications

- **Compatible with:** 8-litre pressure water tanks (standard sizing)
- **Material:** EPDM/butyl rubber compound
- **Origin:** Made in Italy
- **Certifications:** EU hygienic certification + US institutional approval for drinking water contact
- **Suitable for:** Drinking water, reverse osmosis system holding tanks, domestic pressure systems

## Compatibility check

Most 8-litre pressure tanks use the same standard bladder dimensions, but if you're not sure about your specific tank brand, send us a photo of the tank label and dimensions and we'll confirm fitment before you order.

## Installation

Replacement requires draining the existing tank and removing the old bladder through the tank's air valve port. This is achievable for confident DIYers with basic plumbing tools, or any plumber will handle it as a 30-minute service call. Don't forget to re-pressurise the tank to its specified pre-charge after fitting the new bladder.
products.meta_title: Replacement Bladder for 8L Pressure Tank | Enviro Aqua
products.meta_description: Italian-made EPDM/butyl rubber bladder for 8L pressure water tanks. EU & US drinking-water certified. Restore your tank for a fraction of the cost.

products.title: Ultraviolet Water Sterilizer Stainless Steel Unit 55W, 2700LPH Phillip Lamp
products.short_description: Premium 55W UV water steriliser with genuine Philips lamp — destroys 99.9999% of bacteria, viruses, Cryptosporidium, Giardia, and other waterborne micro-organisms without chemicals. Rated for up to 45 L/min (2,700 L/h) flow, ideal for whole-house installation on tank water, bore water, or as a final-stage steriliser after sediment and carbon filtration. 304-grade stainless steel housing.
products.description:
## How UV sterilisation works

Ultraviolet light at 254nm wavelength damages the DNA of bacteria, viruses, and protozoa, rendering them unable to reproduce. Killed organisms can't infect, can't proliferate, and pose no health risk — the same principle hospitals use to sterilise medical equipment, food processors use for production line hygiene, and municipal water authorities use as backup disinfection on supply lines.

Critically, UV does this **without chemicals**. No chlorine, no chloramines, no taste residue, no maintenance beyond annual lamp replacement.

## When you need UV sterilisation

- **Tank water installations:** Rainwater can carry bird/animal contamination, biological residues, and pathogens that no amount of sediment filtering will fix
- **Bore water:** Bacterial contamination from groundwater is common, particularly after heavy rain or seasonal water table changes
- **Rural properties:** Creek, river, or dam-fed supply
- **Final-stage on city water:** Where you want redundant biological protection regardless of municipal supply
- **Immunocompromised occupants:** Pregnancy, transplant recipients, chemotherapy patients
- **Properties with previous water-quality incidents**

## Why this unit

**Genuine Philips lamp.** Philips is the industry-standard UV-C lamp manufacturer. Their lamps deliver consistent UV-C output across the full lifespan and reach their rated kill efficiency reliably. Cheap no-name lamps degrade faster, miss their wavelength specification, and can fail to sterilise even while appearing to operate.

**304-grade stainless steel housing.** Food-grade stainless that won't corrode, won't leach into the water, and survives long-term contact with treated water.

**Quartz transmission tube.** The lamp sits inside a quartz sleeve so it's isolated from the water — meaning lamp replacement doesn't require system shutdown for waterproofing.

## Specifications

- **UV lamp:** Philips 55W, 2-pin (each side)
- **Flow rate:** Up to 45 L/min (2,700 L/h)
- **Housing:** 304-grade stainless steel
- **Power:** 220-240V to 12V electronic ballast (included)
- **Inlet/outlet:** 3/4" BSP male thread
- **Sterilisation efficacy:** 99.9999% on bacteria, viruses, Cryptosporidium, Giardia
- **Lamp lifespan:** ~9,000 hours (12 months continuous operation)
- **Includes:** Stainless housing, electronic ballast, quartz transmission tube, Philips lamp, mounting brackets

## Installation requirements

**Critical:** UV must be installed AFTER sediment and carbon filtration stages. UV does not penetrate cloudy or sediment-laden water — without pre-filtration the kill efficiency falls dramatically.

The unit can be mounted horizontally or vertically. Requires a permanent 240V electrical connection (an electrician should make this connection, particularly if installation is outdoors or in a damp environment). The lamp should be replaced annually for full efficacy regardless of how it appears to be operating.

## Postage note

Postage is offered to main Australian cities. For rural areas, NT, and Tasmania, please contact us before ordering — we'll confirm exact freight costs.

products.description:
## How UV sterilisation works

Ultraviolet light at 254nm wavelength damages the DNA of bacteria, viruses, and protozoa, rendering them unable to reproduce. Killed organisms can't infect, can't proliferate, and pose no health risk — the same principle hospitals use to sterilise medical equipment, food processors use for production line hygiene, and municipal water authorities use as backup disinfection on supply lines.

Critically, UV does this **without chemicals**. No chlorine, no chloramines, no taste residue.

## 40W vs 55W — which to choose

Both units handle the same 45 L/min flow rate. The differences:

- **40W (this unit):** Lower power consumption, lower running cost (~$25/year in electricity), 1/2" inlet/outlet for smaller plumbing
- **55W:** Higher reserve capacity for fluctuating water clarity, 3/4" inlet/outlet for high-flow installations, longer kill time on harder-to-treat organisms

For most residential tank-water installations, the 40W unit is sufficient. Choose the 55W if you have particularly turbid source water, very high household demand, or want the additional safety margin.

## When you need UV sterilisation

- Tank water installations (rainwater can carry biological contamination)
- Bore water (groundwater bacterial contamination is common)
- Rural properties on creek/river/dam supply
- Final-stage on city water for redundant biological protection
- Immunocompromised occupants

## Specifications

- **UV lamp:** 40W, 4-pin one-side configuration
- **Flow rate:** Up to 45 L/min (2,700 L/h)
- **Housing:** 304-grade stainless steel
- **Power:** 220-240V to 12V electronic ballast (included)
- **Inlet/outlet:** 1/2" BSP male thread
- **Sterilisation efficacy:** 99.9999% on bacteria, viruses, Cryptosporidium, Giardia
- **Lamp lifespan:** ~9,000 hours (12 months continuous operation)
- **Includes:** Stainless housing, electronic ballast, quartz transmission tube, 4-pin lamp, mounting brackets

## Installation requirements

**Critical:** UV must be installed AFTER sediment and carbon filtration stages. UV does not penetrate cloudy or sediment-laden water — without pre-filtration the kill efficiency falls dramatically.

Mount horizontally or vertically. Requires a permanent 240V electrical connection. The lamp should be replaced annually for full efficacy regardless of how it appears to be operating.

UV water steriliser that uses ultraviolet light to destroy 99.99% of bacteria, viruses, and waterborne pathogens — without chemicals, additives, or chlorine taste. Key specifications: 220V. Ideal as a final-stage steriliser after sediment and carbon filtration, or for tank water, rainwater, and bore water systems.

Ultraviolet sterilisation works by exposing water to UV-C light at a wavelength of 254nm. This wavelength damages the DNA of bacteria, viruses, and protozoa, rendering them unable to reproduce — effectively killing them without introducing any chemicals or altering the taste of your water. UV sterilisation is particularly valuable for rainwater, bore water, and any water source where biological contamination is a concern. The unit should be installed after sediment and carbon filtration stages, as UV cannot penetrate water with high turbidity.

Install after sediment and carbon filtration stages — never directly on incoming water with high turbidity, as UV cannot penetrate cloudy water effectively. Mount the unit horizontally or vertically per manufacturer specifications, ensure proper electrical connection, and replace the UV lamp annually for full sterilisation efficacy.

products.title: 1 Inch Flexible Stainless Steel Hose for Pressure Tank
products.short_description: 1-inch braided stainless steel flexible connector hose — the right way to plumb in a pressure tank, hot water unit, or large filter housing. The flexibility absorbs vibration, eases installation in tight spaces, and reduces stress on threaded joints. 1" external thread with 1/2" internal diameter.
products.description:
## When to use a flexible connector

Every pressure tank, hot water unit, and large filter housing should have at least one flexible connector somewhere in its plumbing — usually on the supply side. The flexibility:

1. **Absorbs water hammer and vibration** that would otherwise transmit into rigid copper or PEX runs
2. **Allows for thermal expansion** without stressing threaded joints
3. **Makes installation possible in tight spaces** where a rigid pipe won't align
4. **Simplifies servicing** — disconnect the flex hose to swap the unit out, rather than cutting and re-soldering pipework

Plumbers will quietly thank you for installing one of these even when the manufacturer didn't strictly require it.

## Construction

The inner core is EPDM rubber — the standard for drinking water applications and rated for the temperatures encountered in pressurised water systems. The outer braid is 304-grade stainless steel, providing burst protection and abrasion resistance. The fittings are nickel-plated brass, chosen for compatibility with both copper and stainless plumbing without risk of galvanic corrosion.

## Specifications

- **External thread:** 1" BSP (both ends)
- **Internal diameter:** 1/2" (DN15 equivalent)
- **Inner core:** EPDM rubber (drinking water rated)
- **Outer braid:** 304 stainless steel
- **Fittings:** Nickel-plated brass
- **Suitable for:** Cold and hot water (up to 90°C)

## Common uses

- Pressure tank inlet/outlet connections
- Whole-house filter system supply lines
- Hot water unit cold-water inlet
- General-purpose flexible plumbing where rigid pipework won't fit

## Important note on sizing

The 1" specification refers to the **external thread** — not the internal flow diameter, which is 1/2". This is standard for braided flex hoses (the braid and fittings consume the rest of the diameter). For most residential applications the 1/2" internal flow is more than adequate.

1. Sediment, Dirt, & Rust
2. Chemicals, Chlorine, Organics , Taste, & Odour

Giardia needs to be filtered out through 5 micron filtration. In the past, the only method of doing this was to buy expensive 5 micron carbon filters. We are happy to say that we now offer a much cheaper alternative, which is the 5 micron Sediment Filter. products.description:
Twin Undersink Replacement Filters PP+CTO Standard Size 10''x2.5'' Inc
When buying filters the 3 main aspect you need to block out are:

1. Sediment, Dirt, & Rust
2. Chemicals, Chlorine, Organics , Taste, & Odour

Giardia needs to be filtered out through 5 micron filtration. In the past, the only method of doing this was to buy expensive 5 micron carbon filters. We are happy to say that we now offer a much cheaper alternative, which is the 5 micron Sediment Filter. The 0.5 micron sediment filter effectively reduces Giardia, thus allowing you to purchase any micron rating Carbon Filters, because regardless of the micron rating they will ALL extract the chemical elements.
Polypropylene Spun Sediment Filter - 5 Micron
These economical "HPF" PERFORMANCE sediment cartridges are constructed from polypropylene which is spun and melted simultaneously. This technique means there is no centre core to restrict filter performance. The "HPF" series of sediment filters are compatible with most liquids and are highly effective for sediment, rust, sand, silt, and algae removal. "HPF" performance sediment filters have no chemical residuals. They are extremely high performing , carry a heavy load of sediment before requiring replacement. We choose to use these sediment filters over all other types due to the high performance , high flow rate, high load capacity, and there inability to grow bacterial slime. Suitable for filtering cooking oil.
Pure 100% Coconut Carbon Block Water Filter - 5 Micron
The perfect carbon block filter is made from 100% Coconut Shell Carbon, which creates what many believe to be sweeter tasting water. The unique pore structure of this carbon is well suited for chemical adsorption, including VOC’s, while reducing chlorine and chemicals that contribute to taste and odour. This high quality 100% Coconut Carbon filter is the exact filter we use as our front line carbon filter. As a rule it is difficult to find 100% coconut carbon filters. Most lower priced filters on the market are a blend of coconut carbon and coal based carbon. The problem with coal based carbon is that it has a shorter life and often results in a less palatable flavour. We use this 100% coconut carbon filter in all of our pre-assembled kits. These are top of the range HIGH QUALITY coconut carbon block filters are ideal for taste and odour issues, and perfect for total extraction of town water chemicals. TOP OF THE RANGE 100% coconut carbon, this particular filter is currently supplied throughout the European market as a premium drinking water filter. As the Exclusive importer to Australia, we are in a prime position to offer you this high quality filter at rock bottom prices, direct from importer to the public.

Most household applications see 6 to 12 months of service life from each cartridge, though high-sediment water or high-flow households may require more frequent changes. Signs that it's time to replace include: reduced flow rate, return of chlorine taste or odour, or visible discolouration of the cartridge. Always flush new cartridges before drinking the first batch of water.

products.title: Single-Phase Submersible Clean water Pump 370W lift 10m
products.short_description: Heavy-duty 370W single-phase submersible water pump for clean water applications — moving water from wells, tanks, sumps, and underground sources where above-ground pumping isn't an option. 1HP equivalent output with 10m maximum head lift and 2 m³/h (2,000 L/h) flow rate. 240V mains operation, 4.95kg unit, suitable for household water transfer, garden irrigation, and small-scale water treatment applications.
products.description:
## When you need a submersible

Submersible pumps go where above-ground pumps can't:

- **Bore wells** — pumping water out of an underground well
- **Storage tanks** — drawing water from the bottom of a tank for distribution
- **Sumps and pits** — clearing water from below-ground areas
- **Garden irrigation** — drawing from rainwater tanks or natural sources
- **Pool top-ups and water transfer** — moving water between containers

Because they sit submerged in the water source, they don't need priming, can handle vertical lifts that would be physically impossible with above-ground pumps, and operate quietly (the water cools and silences the motor).

## Specifications

- **Power:** 370W (1HP equivalent)
- **Voltage:** 240V single-phase mains
- **Maximum head lift:** 10 metres
- **Maximum flow rate:** 2 m³/h (2,000 L/h)
- **Maximum operating temperature:** 60°C
- **Minimum operating temperature:** 0°C
- **Cable length:** 1 metre
- **Weight:** 4.95 kg
- **Dimensions:** 17cm wide × 34cm tall
- **Power source:** Electric (240V)
- **Suitable for:** Clean water and water treatment applications

## Working condition limits

- **Maximum submersion depth:** 5 metres from the impeller centre
- **Maximum medium temperature:** 40°C
- **Suitable pH range:** 4-10
- **Maximum kinematic viscosity:** 7×10⁻⁷ to 23×10⁻⁶ m²/s
- **Maximum medium density:** 1.2×10³ kg/m³

## What it's NOT for

This is a **clean water pump** — not designed for sewage, slurry, or high-particulate water. The impeller will clog and the motor seal can fail. For waste water or sediment-heavy water, use a dedicated sump or sewage pump instead.

## Installation requirements

**Critical:** The pump must always operate fully submerged — running it dry will destroy the motor seal in seconds. Most installations include a low-water cut-off switch to prevent dry-running.

Electrical connection requires a waterproof junction at the cable termination — a licensed electrician should make this connection, particularly for outdoor or well-pump installations. Do not extend the supplied cable; if you need a longer run, use a properly-rated submersible pump cable joiner.

## Suitable applications

- Domestic well pumping (residential bore systems)
- Rainwater tank distribution
- Sump pump-out (clean water only)
- Garden irrigation from tank or natural source
- Pool top-up and emergency drainage
- Transfer between water storage tanks

## Australian electrical standards

240V mains operation suitable for Australian household electrical systems. Permanent installation should comply with AS/NZS 3000 wiring standards — engage a licensed electrician for permanent connections.

products.title: UV Water Filter | Ultraviolet Sterilisation | 2700LPH | 55W | 220V - 240V
products.short_description: 55W UV water steriliser with genuine Philips lamp — destroys 99.9999% of bacteria, viruses, Cryptosporidium, Giardia, and other waterborne pathogens without chemicals. Rated for 2,700 L/h flow with 3/4" inlet/outlet, ideal for whole-house installation on tank water, bore water, or as final-stage sterilisation after sediment and carbon filtration. 304-grade stainless steel housing. 220-240V Australian mains compatible.
products.description:
## How UV sterilisation works

Ultraviolet light at 254nm wavelength damages the DNA of bacteria, viruses, and protozoa, rendering them unable to reproduce. Killed organisms can't infect, can't proliferate, and pose no health risk — the same principle hospitals use to sterilise medical equipment, food processors use for production line hygiene, and municipal water authorities use as backup disinfection on supply lines.

Critically, UV does this **without chemicals**. No chlorine, no chloramines, no taste residue, no maintenance beyond annual lamp replacement.

## When you need UV sterilisation

- **Tank water installations:** Rainwater can carry bird/animal contamination, biological residues, and pathogens that no amount of sediment filtering removes
- **Bore water:** Bacterial contamination from groundwater is common, particularly after heavy rain or seasonal water-table changes
- **Rural properties:** Creek, river, or dam-fed supply
- **Final-stage on city water:** Where you want redundant biological protection
- **Immunocompromised occupants:** Pregnancy, transplant recipients, chemotherapy patients
- **Food and beverage businesses:** Where verified water safety is required

## Why this unit

**Genuine Philips lamp.** Philips is the industry-standard UV-C lamp manufacturer. Their lamps deliver consistent UV-C output across the full lifespan and reach their rated kill efficiency reliably. Cheap no-name lamps degrade faster, miss their wavelength specification, and can fail to sterilise even while appearing to operate.

**304-grade stainless steel housing.** Food-grade stainless that won't corrode, won't leach into the water, and survives long-term contact with treated water.

**Quartz transmission tube.** The lamp sits inside a quartz sleeve so it's isolated from the water — meaning lamp replacement doesn't require system shutdown for waterproofing.

## Specifications

- **UV lamp:** Philips 55W, 2-pin (each side)
- **Flow rate:** Up to 2,700 L/h (45 L/min)
- **Housing:** 304-grade stainless steel
- **Power:** 220-240V mains, electronic ballast (included)
- **Inlet/outlet:** 3/4" BSP male thread
- **Sterilisation efficacy:** 99.9999% on bacteria, viruses, Cryptosporidium, Giardia
- **Lamp lifespan:** ~9,000 hours (12 months continuous operation)
- **Includes:** Stainless housing, electronic ballast, quartz transmission tube, Philips lamp, mounting brackets

## Installation requirements

**Critical:** UV must be installed AFTER sediment and carbon filtration stages. UV does not penetrate cloudy or sediment-laden water — without pre-filtration the kill efficiency falls dramatically.

The unit can be mounted horizontally or vertically. Requires a permanent 240V electrical connection (an electrician should make this connection, particularly if installation is outdoors or in a damp environment). The lamp should be replaced annually for full efficacy regardless of how it appears to be operating.

## Postage note

Postage is offered to main Australian cities. For rural areas, NT, and Tasmania, please contact us before ordering — we'll confirm exact freight costs.

products.title: Premium Water Filter Faucet Tap Reverse Osmosis Drinking RO NSF
products.short_description: NSF-certified premium drinking water faucet for water filtration systems. Independently tested for material safety by NSF International — meaning no lead leaching, no zinc bleed, certified safe for daily drinking water contact. Quality ceramic disc valve, 1/4" tube fitting that works with any standard RO or under-sink water filter. Generous 6.5cm thread length suits all benchtop and under-sink installations.
products.description:
## Why NSF certification matters for drinking water

Most drinking water faucets on the Australian market are unrated — assembled from imported components with no third-party certification of material safety. Cheap drinking taps can leach lead and zinc into the water (the very contaminants your RO system just removed), particularly in the first draw of the morning when water has been sitting in the tap body overnight.

**NSF International** is the global gold standard for drinking water component certification. NSF-certified faucets have been independently tested and verified for:

- **Material safety** — no harmful leaching from any wetted component
- **Structural integrity** — pressure rating, thermal cycling, mechanical durability
- **Lead-free construction** — sub-0.25% lead by weight (the WHO standard)

When you're filtering water specifically to remove contaminants, the tap that delivers it should not be re-introducing them.

## Genuine ceramic disc valve

The internal valve is a ceramic disc cartridge — the same valve technology used in premium kitchen mixers. Ceramic discs:

- **Don't wear out** under typical residential use (rated to 500,000+ cycles)
- **Don't drip** the way rubber-washer valves do as they age
- **Operate smoothly** without the gradual stiffening that affects cheap valves

Cheaper drinking taps use rubber-seal valves that develop drips within 2-3 years.

## Why the thread length matters

Many imported drinking taps have a **short 4cm thread** — long enough for thin stainless steel sinks but too short to clear most stone benchtops, which are typically 30-40mm thick. Customers buy them, install them, and find the mounting nut won't reach the underside of the benchtop to tighten properly.

This tap has a **6.5cm thread length**, suitable for virtually all Australian benchtop installations including thick stone, engineered timber, and double-thickness laminate.

## Specifications

- **Certification:** NSF (drinking water material safety)
- **Construction:** Lead-free brass with chrome plating
- **Valve:** Ceramic disc cartridge
- **Tubing connection:** 1/4" push-fit (fits 99% of water filter systems on the market)
- **Mounting thread length:** 6.5cm (suits stone, timber, and standard sinks)
- **Mounting thread diameter:** 10.8mm

## Compatibility

Works with any reverse osmosis system or under-sink water filter that uses standard 1/4" tubing — that's virtually every residential RO and water filter system on the Australian market. No adapter needed.

## A note on positioning

This is a premium product, not a budget tap. If you're spending hundreds on a filtration system to remove contaminants, the few extra dollars on a certified tap is sensible insurance. If you're filtering water just to improve taste and you're not concerned about material safety, a cheaper non-NSF tap will save you $30 — and that's a fair trade-off.

products.title: Shower Filter | 15 Stages | Includes Extra Cartridge
products.short_description: Fifteen-stage shower filter that reduces chlorine, heavy metals, and impurities before water hits your skin. Includes KDF-55, calcium sulphite, and activated carbon media — the same combination used in spa-grade shower filtration. Particularly valuable for sensitive skin, dry hair, eczema sufferers, and anyone bothered by chlorinated water. Universal 1/2" connection fits virtually every Australian shower. Includes one extra replacement cartridge in the box.
products.description:
## Why filter your shower water?

When chlorinated mains water hits hot shower air, a meaningful portion of that chlorine vapourises into the steam you're breathing — making shower exposure a significant route of chlorine intake on top of what hits your skin and hair directly. For people with sensitive skin, eczema, dry scalp, chlorine sensitivity, or just anyone who wants a noticeably better shower, this filter makes a real difference.

## Fifteen stages of filtration in one cartridge

The cartridge combines three complementary media in a multi-stage configuration:

- **KDF-55 (Kinetic Degradation Fluxion media):** A copper-zinc alloy that converts free chlorine into a harmless chloride form via redox reaction. Effective at the high temperatures of a shower, where carbon-only filters lose efficiency.
- **Calcium sulphite:** Specifically targets chloramine — the chlorine compound increasingly used in Australian municipal water that standard carbon filters struggle with.
- **Activated carbon:** Polishes the water, captures organics, and removes any residual taste or odour compounds.

Together they reduce chlorine, chloramines, heavy metals (lead, mercury, nickel, chromium), pesticides, and inhibit the growth of mould, algae, and fungi within the filter housing itself.

## Skin and hair benefits

Customers with sensitive skin typically notice the difference within 2-3 weeks. Common reports: reduced eczema flare-ups, less itching after showering, less dry scalp and dandruff, and visibly softer hair that holds colour treatments longer. It won't fix every skin condition, but for chlorine-sensitive users it consistently improves shower experience.

## Specifications

- **Filter media:** KDF-55 + Calcium Sulphite + Activated Carbon
- **Filtration stages:** 15
- **Housing material:** ABS plastic
- **Dimensions:** 117 mm × 85 mm
- **Inlet/outlet:** 1/2" BSP universal Australian shower thread
- **Cartridge lifespan:** 4-6 months typical use (longer for low-use households)
- **Compatible with:** Fixed showers, hand-held showers, and rainfall heads

## Installation — genuinely DIY

Unscrew your existing shower head from the wall arm. Screw the filter onto the wall arm. Screw your shower head onto the filter outlet. Two minutes, no plumber, no tools beyond hand-tightening (and Teflon tape if you want a paranoid-tight seal).

## What's in the box

1× shower filter housing, 1× installed cartridge, 1× spare replacement cartridge — enough for 8-12 months of filtered showering before you need to reorder.

products.title: Big Blue Whole House Water Filter and UV Ultraviolet Sterilization System
products.short_description: Three-stage Big Blue whole-house water filtration system with integrated UV sterilisation — protecting every tap, shower, and water-using appliance in your home. The 20" × 4.5" Big Blue housings handle high flow rates without pressure loss, while the 55W UV steriliser destroys 99.99% of bacteria, viruses, and waterborne pathogens before water reaches your plumbing. Ideal for tank water, bore water, and any property where water biology is a concern.
products.description:
## When you need filtration AND sterilisation

Standard whole-house filters handle physical contaminants (sediment, rust, particles) and chemical contaminants (chlorine, taste, odour) — but they don't kill bacteria. For most properties on chlorinated mains supply, that's fine: the chlorine in the supply has already done the disinfection work.

But for properties on **tank water, bore water, or any unchlorinated source** — and increasingly for properties where mains chlorine levels are inconsistent — you need both filtration *and* biological sterilisation. UV is the cleanest way to sterilise: no chemicals added, no taste residue, no maintenance beyond an annual lamp replacement.

## How the three stages work together

**Stage 1: 5-micron polypropylene sediment filter** — Captures sand, dirt, rust, and suspended particles before they reach the more expensive downstream stages. First-line protection for the whole system.

**Stage 2: 5-micron coconut carbon block** — Reduces chlorine, taste, odour, and a wide range of organic contaminants. Coconut-shell carbon is preferred over coal-based carbon for its higher surface area and lower silica leaching.

**Stage 3: 55W UV steriliser** — Destroys 99.9999% of bacteria, viruses, Cryptosporidium, Giardia, and other micro-organisms. The Philips lamp is the industry standard for UV-C output reliability.

Critically, UV sterilisation **must be the final stage** — UV doesn't penetrate cloudy water, so sediment must be removed first. This system has the staging right.

## Why Big Blue housings matter

20" × 4.5" Big Blue housings are the high-flow standard for whole-house filtration. Compared to 10" × 2.5" under-sink size:

- **5-8× more filter surface area** = lower pressure drop, higher flow rate
- **5-8× longer cartridge life** = annual changes instead of quarterly
- **Better for high-demand households** = no pressure loss when multiple taps run

For a typical 4-person family on city water, expect 12+ months between cartridge changes. Tank-water households should check more frequently in summer when sediment loads peak.

## What's included

- 2× 20" × 4.5" Big Blue housings (sediment + carbon stages)
- 55W UV steriliser unit (304 stainless steel housing)
- Philips quality 2-pin UV lamp (pre-installed)
- 220-240V to 12V electronic ballast
- White-coated metal mounting frame for whole assembly
- 5-micron polypropylene sediment filter (pre-installed)
- 5-micron coconut carbon block filter (pre-installed)
- Built-in pressure release valve
- Plastic housing spanner
- Mounting brackets for UV unit
- Quartz transmission tube for UV lamp

## Specifications

- **Stages:** 3 (sediment + carbon + UV)
- **Housing size:** 20" × 4.5" (Big Blue)
- **Housing material:** Reinforced polypropylene with metal frame
- **Inlet/outlet:** 1" BSP
- **UV lamp wattage:** 55W (Philips)
- **UV housing:** 304-grade stainless steel
- **UV inlet/outlet:** 3/4" BSP male
- **Power:** 220-240V mains (with 12V ballast for UV)
- **Approx dimensions:** 58cm wide × 25cm deep × 77cm high

## Installation

Installation must be carried out by a licensed plumber and electrician (plumber for the water connections, electrician for the UV unit's permanent power connection). Allow 2-3 hours for full installation including bypass valve, mounting, and commissioning. The UV lamp should be replaced annually for full sterilisation efficacy.

## Suitable for

- Properties on tank water (all rainwater installations)
- Properties on bore water
- Rural properties on creek/river supply
- City properties wanting redundant biological protection
- Anywhere with immunocompromised occupants
- Commercial premises (offices, gyms, food prep) wanting verified water safety

products.description:
Coconut activated carbon block (CTO) cartridge that reduces chlorine, taste, odour, and a wide range of organic compounds from your water supply. Compatible with standard housings used across major water filter brands.

Replacement frequency depends on your water quality and usage. Most household applications see 6 to 12 months of service life from each cartridge, though high-sediment water or high-flow households may require more frequent changes. Signs that it's time to replace include: reduced flow rate, return of chlorine taste or odour, or visible discolouration of the cartridge. Always flush new cartridges before drinking the first batch of water.

products.title: Back to Wall Rimless Dual Flush Ceramic Toilet Suite Soft Close Seat P Trap WELS
products.short_description: WaterMark certified, WELS rated toilet suite designed for full compliance with Australian plumbing standards (AS/NZS 6400). Rimless bowl design eliminates the traditional flush rim — easier to clean, more hygienic, and a modern aesthetic that suits contemporary bathroom designs. Soft-close seat included. Back-to-wall design conceals plumbing and waste connections for a streamlined appearance. Suitable for residential and commercial installations throughout Australia.
products.description:
WaterMark certified, WELS rated toilet suite designed for full compliance with Australian plumbing standards (AS/NZS 6400). Rimless bowl design eliminates the traditional flush rim — easier to clean, more hygienic, and a modern aesthetic that suits contemporary bathroom designs. Soft-close seat included. Back-to-wall design conceals plumbing and waste connections for a streamlined appearance. Suitable for residential and commercial installations throughout Australia.

WaterMark certification under AS/NZS 6400 is mandatory for any toilet installed in Australia — without it, the installation is non-compliant and may not be passed by certifying plumbers. WELS ratings indicate water efficiency: modern dual-flush toilets typically use 3 litres for a half flush and 4.5 to 6 litres for a full flush, dramatically lower than older single-flush models that used 11+ litres per flush.

Rimless designs are an increasingly popular hygiene upgrade — without the traditional rim, there's nowhere for bacteria, mineral deposits, and limescale to hide. Cleaning is faster, and the bowl stays cleaner between cleans.

Installation must be carried out by a licensed plumber as required by Australian plumbing regulations. Allow 1 to 2 hours for installation including waste connection, water supply, and final commissioning.

Durable High-Quality Ceramic – Scratch-resistant, easy-to-clean gloss white finish for long-lasting performance.

Back Inlet Connection – Designed for efficient installation and compatibility with standard plumbing setups.

products.title: Toilet Rimless Modern Watermark Ceramic p trap Commode modern 2Piece Toilet WELS
products.short_description: WaterMark certified rimless dual-flush toilet suite, fully compliant with Australian plumbing standards (AS/NZS 6400). Two-piece floor-mount design with rimless bowl for easier cleaning, soft-close UF seat, and dual P-trap (180mm) / S-trap (100/250mm) options to suit retrofit and new-build installations. WELS-rated 4.5L/3L dual flush. Includes R&T fittings and pan connector.
products.description:
## Compliant for Australian installation

Any toilet installed in Australia must carry **WaterMark certification under AS/NZS 6400** — without it, the installation isn't compliant and won't pass a certifying plumber's inspection. This suite is fully WaterMark certified and WELS-rated, suitable for residential and commercial installation throughout Australia.

## Why rimless matters for hygiene

Traditional toilets have a rim around the inside of the bowl that holds the flush water — and also captures bacteria, mineral deposits, and limescale in places you can't easily reach with a brush. Rimless designs eliminate this entire harbour. The flush water enters through directional jets that swirl the bowl without needing a rim. The result is a toilet that:

- Stays visibly cleaner between cleans
- Is faster to actually clean (a single pass with the brush reaches everywhere)
- Doesn't develop the mineral build-up that ages traditional toilets visually
- Is more hygienic in shared bathrooms

## Trap flexibility

This suite is engineered to suit both common Australian waste configurations:

- **P-trap (180mm):** Wall-exit waste, common in modern construction
- **S-trap (100/250mm):** Floor-exit waste, common in older homes and slab-on-ground construction

This is genuinely useful — many toilet suites are sold as either P-trap *or* S-trap, forcing you to commit before knowing your exact rough-in. This one works for either, simplifying the order and reducing the risk of getting the wrong fitting.

## Soft-close UF seat included

The included seat is **UF (urea-formaldehyde resin)** — the high-end material used in commercial toilets, more durable than the cheap PP plastic seats found on imported budget toilets. Soft-close hinges prevent the seat slamming, which extends the life of both the seat and the toilet (slamming chips porcelain over time).

## Specifications

- **Type:** Two-piece floor-mount toilet suite
- **Bowl:** Rimless ceramic
- **Flush:** WELS-rated 4.5L full / 3L half (dual flush)
- **Trap:** P-trap 180mm OR S-trap 100/250mm
- **Seat:** UF soft-close (included)
- **Cistern fittings:** R&T (R&T is the Australian-standard valve manufacturer)
- **Dimensions:** 640 × 370 × 800 mm
- **Material:** Vitreous china, fired at 1260°C+
- **Certifications:** WaterMark, WELS

## What's in the box

- Toilet pan with rimless flush bowl
- Cistern with R&T inlet/outlet fittings
- UF soft-close toilet seat with hinges
- Flush push button
- Pan connector (P-trap and S-trap configurable)

## Installation

Installation must be carried out by a licensed plumber as required by Australian plumbing regulations. Allow 1-2 hours for installation including waste connection, water supply, and final commissioning.

products.title: 3 Way Pull Down Spray Tap - Kitchen Mixer in Black, Chrome and Nickel
products.short_description: Three-way kitchen mixer with a built-in pull-down spray head — combining hot, cold, and filtered drinking water in a single tap. Designed for kitchens with a reverse osmosis or under-sink filtration system, it eliminates the need for a separate drinking water faucet and the extra sink hole that comes with it. Solid brass construction in your choice of matte black, brushed nickel, or polished chrome.
products.description:
## Three taps in one — without the second sink hole

Most homes with a reverse osmosis filtration system end up drilling a second hole in the sink for the dedicated drinking tap. It works, but it's not pretty, and many modern stone benchtops can't be cleanly drilled at all. This three-way mixer solves the problem: hot water, cold water, and filtered RO water all flow through the same tap, controlled by separate handles. One sink penetration, one fixture, three water sources.

## Pull-down spray for actual kitchen use

The extending spray head pulls down on a flexible braided hose, giving you a wide reach across the sink for filling tall pots, rinsing produce, and cleaning down the sink itself. The magnetic dock pulls it back into position when you're done — no awkward fiddling, no hose that won't retract.

## Built for daily use, not just to look good

The body is solid brass — the right material for a tap. Brass resists corrosion, doesn't crack under thermal stress, and lasts decades when properly maintained. Cheap zinc-alloy taps eventually pit, leak at the cartridge, and need replacing in 5-7 years. This one is built to outlast the kitchen renovation it's installed in.

## Specifications

- **Material:** Solid brass body
- **Operation:** Three-way (hot, cold, filtered)
- **Filter connection:** 1/4" push-fit (standard RO system compatible)
- **Hot/cold connection:** 1/2" BSP flexible hoses (included)
- **Spray function:** Pull-down with magnetic dock
- **Total height:** 40 cm
- **Handle width:** 17.5 cm
- **Finish options:** Matte Black, Brushed Nickel, Polished Chrome

## What's in the box

Tap body, two flexible braided hot/cold hoses, mounting nuts and washers, 1/4" push-fit filter inlet, installation instructions.

## Compatibility

Works with any reverse osmosis system or under-sink water filter that uses standard 1/4" tubing — the connection used by virtually every residential RO and water filter system on the Australian market.

products.title: Spring Loaded Tap - Kitchen Mixer in Brushed Nickel
products.short_description: Industrial-style spring-loaded kitchen mixer tap in brushed nickel finish. The exposed coil spring with pull-down pre-rinse spray is designed for serious kitchen use — pot filling, produce washing, and sink cleaning at proper commercial-grade flow. WELS 5-star rated for water efficiency and WaterMark-certified for full Australian plumbing compliance.
products.description:
## A commercial-style tap, scaled for home kitchens

The exposed-coil spring tap was originally a commercial kitchen design — built for restaurants where chefs needed to flex a heavy spray nozzle around a busy prep area without the hose getting in the way. Over the last decade it's become the signature look of the Australian industrial-aesthetic kitchen, and for good reason: it works.

The spring isn't decorative — it actively returns the spray head to its rest position, holds the hose under tension so it doesn't flop into the sink, and absorbs the strain that would otherwise be on the internal hose. The result is a tap that handles pot-filling and rinsing far better than a static gooseneck.

## Brushed nickel — the practical premium finish

Brushed nickel sits between the cool of polished chrome and the warm of brushed gold. Practically:

- **Hides water spots and fingerprints** better than polished chrome
- **Less prone to scratch visibility** than polished finishes
- **Resistant to tarnishing** with normal kitchen cleaning products
- **Coordinates with stainless appliances** — the most common Australian kitchen appliance finish

Polished chrome looks better on showroom day; brushed nickel still looks good five years in.

## Genuine Australian compliance

- **WELS 5-star rating** under AS/NZS 6400:2016 — meaning verified low water consumption that helps reduce your water bill and supports sustainability certifications
- **WaterMark certified** under AS/NZS 3718 — meaning the tap meets Australian plumbing component standards and can be certified by your installing plumber without question

Some imported industrial-style taps have neither rating. Installing them in a new build or major renovation can complicate plumbing certification. This tap won't.

## Specifications

- **Style:** Industrial spring-loaded with pull-down pre-rinse
- **Finish:** Brushed Nickel
- **Body material:** Solid brass
- **Spring:** Exposed coil with hose retraction
- **Spray head:** Pull-down with two-mode aerator/spray
- **Operation:** Single-handle hot/cold mixer
- **Connections:** 1/2" BSP flexible hoses (included)
- **Certifications:** WELS 5-star, WaterMark
- **Standards:** AS/NZS 6400:2016, AS/NZS 3718

## What's in the box

Tap body with pre-installed spring and spray head, two flexible braided hot/cold hoses, mounting nuts and washers, decorative mounting plate, installation instructions.

## Installation

Standard single-hole sink mount. Connection to existing 1/2" BSP hot and cold water lines. A licensed plumber can install in 30-45 minutes.

seo.meta_title: Spring-Loaded Kitchen Mixer (Nickel) | Enviro Aqua

products.title: Premium RO Filter Tap SUS304 - NSF Approved in Black, Nickel and Gold
products.short_description: Premium dedicated drinking water tap for reverse osmosis systems, made from food-grade SUS304 stainless steel and NSF-certified for direct drinking water contact. Modern swan-neck design with 360° rotation and a 28cm reach over the benchtop. Available in matte black, brushed gold, or brushed nickel.
products.description:
## A drinking tap that won't leach lead

Standard chrome-plated zinc-alloy taps are fine for hot and cold water — but for a tap that's dispensing the water you actually drink every day, the material matters. Cheap drinking taps can leach trace lead and zinc into the water (the very contaminants your RO system just removed), particularly in the first draw of the morning when water has been sitting in the tap body overnight.

This tap is built from **SUS304 stainless steel** — the same food-grade alloy used in commercial kitchen equipment, surgical instruments, and high-end faucets. It's **NSF-certified** for direct drinking water contact, meaning it's been independently tested for material safety and certified not to leach contaminants.

## Modern design that works in any kitchen

The swan-neck profile is designed for clearance — you can fit a tall water bottle or a stockpot directly under the spout without moving the tap aside. The body rotates 360° on its mounting, so you can swing it out of the way against your splashback when you're not using it.

Three finish options coordinate with current Australian kitchen design trends:

- **Matte Black:** Pairs with black tapware suites, dark cabinetry, and timber benches
- **Brushed Gold:** Warm finish for transitional and Hamptons-style kitchens
- **Brushed Nickel:** The most versatile option, works with chrome, white, and stone benchtops

## Specifications

- **Material:** SUS304 stainless steel (food-grade)
- **Certification:** NSF (drinking water contact safety)
- **Style:** Modern swan-neck with 360° rotation
- **Total height:** 36 cm
- **Spout reach:** 28 cm over benchtop
- **Mounting:** 11mm threaded through-deck
- **Connection:** Standard 1/4" tube
- **Finish options:** Matte Black, Brushed Gold, Brushed Nickel

## Compatibility

Connects to any reverse osmosis system or under-sink water filter that uses standard 1/4" tubing — that's virtually every residential RO system on the Australian market. No adapter needed.

## Installation

Drops into any 11-12mm hole drilled or punched through your benchtop or sink. Most kitchen sinks already have an unused 'soap dispenser' hole that's the right size — if so, no drilling required.

products.title: Aquarium Fish Tank Carbon - Activated Carbon Filter - 500g, 1KG, 2KG, 3KG, 5KG, 25KG
products.short_description: Premium loose-fill activated carbon for aquarium and pond filtration. Removes tannins, odours, organic discolouration, and dissolved chemical residues while leaving beneficial trace minerals intact. Suitable for both freshwater and marine setups. Available from 500g for small tanks up to 25kg for ponds and commercial aquaculture — bulk pricing scales to under $10/kg.
products.description:
## Why loose carbon, not pads or cartridges

Most aquarium filters accept loose activated carbon in a media bag — this is the format used by serious aquarists and aquaculture operators because it gives you control over the exact volume in your filter, lets you replace it on your own schedule (not the manufacturer's cartridge cycle), and works out far cheaper per litre filtered than pre-packaged pads.

## What it removes

- **Tannins** from driftwood that turn water yellow-brown over time
- **Organic discolouration** in established tanks where waste builds up
- **Odours** from decomposing plant matter or fish waste
- **Dissolved chemical residues** from medications after a treatment course
- **Chlorine and chloramines** in tap-water top-ups
- **Residual taste/smell** in koi ponds and water gardens

It does **not** remove ammonia, nitrites, or nitrates (those need biological filtration) and shouldn't be used during medication treatments — it'll strip the medication out before it has a chance to work.

## Suitable for

- **Freshwater tanks:** All species, planted tanks, biotopes
- **Marine tanks:** Reef, FOWLR, quarantine systems
- **Ponds:** Koi ponds, water features, garden ponds
- **Aquaculture:** Commercial growing systems
- **Hydroponic systems:** Where chemical residue control matters

## Pack sizes & pricing

| Size | Price | Per kg |
|---|---|---|
| 500g | $14.95 | $29.90 |
| 1 kg | $19.95 | $19.95 |
| 2 kg | $28.95 | $14.48 |
| 3 kg | $34.95 | $11.65 |
| 5 kg | $54.95 | $10.99 |
| 25 kg | $249.95 | $9.99 |

For most home aquarium setups (under 200L), a 500g or 1kg pack will last a year or more. Pond keepers and commercial operations typically buy the 5kg or 25kg.

## How long does it last?

Activated carbon's lifespan depends on bioload, water volume, and filter flow rate. As a rough guide, replace aquarium carbon every 4-6 weeks for active filtration, longer if you're using it as a polishing stage on already-clean water. Pond carbon typically lasts a season.
