products.title: Commercial Water Bubbler -  Filtered - Stainless Steel - WaterMark Certified - Square Design
products.short_description: A commercial drinking fountain your building's occupants will actually use. The Enviro Aqua Commercial Stainless Steel Filtered Cold Water Bubbler — Square delivers continuously chilled, inline-filtered water from a WaterMark certified , SUS304 stainless steel unit built to handle the daily demands of Australian schools, gyms, offices, and commercial facilities — and built to look good doing it. This is the unit procurement officers, facilities managers, and school business managers specify when they need a compliant, low-maintenance, long-life drinking water solution that won't need replacing in three years.
products.description:
A commercial drinking fountain your building's occupants will actually use. The Enviro Aqua Commercial Stainless Steel Filtered Cold Water Bubbler — Square delivers continuously chilled, inline-filtered water from a WaterMark certified , SUS304 stainless steel unit built to handle the daily demands of Australian schools, gyms, offices, and commercial facilities — and built to look good doing it.

This is the unit procurement officers, facilities managers, and school business managers specify when they need a compliant, low-maintenance, long-life drinking water solution that won't need replacing in three years.

WaterMark Certified — The Legal Requirement No Responsible Buyer Should Skip

Under the Plumbing Code of Australia (PCA) and the National Construction Code (NCC) , any drinking water product permanently connected to the mains supply in a public building must carry WaterMark certification to AS/NZS 3497 . This bubbler does.

In practice, that means:

A licensed plumber can legally install it and issue a certificate of compliance — required in most Australian states for commercial plumbing work
Your building's water infrastructure remains covered by insurance
The unit has been independently tested for structural integrity under Australian mains water pressure, verified to use materials that will not leach contaminants into drinking water, and assessed against correct fitting and pressure standards
The manufacturing facility undergoes ongoing annual auditing as a condition of certification

Many cheaper bubblers sold online carry no WaterMark certification. A licensed plumber will refuse to install them in a school, gym, or commercial building. Before comparing on price, verify every candidate product on the official ABCB WaterMark Product Database .

Why the Square Profile

The square form factor is a deliberate specification choice, not just an aesthetic one. In modern commercial and institutional architecture — open plan offices, contemporary school buildings, fitness centres with clean fit-outs — a square-profile stainless steel unit integrates cleanly against tiled walls, concrete columns, and rendered surfaces in a way that round or cylindrical units simply don't. It reads as a permanent fixture, not an afterthought. For facilities managers, it also means easier edge-to-edge cleaning and a predictable footprint when planning wall space across multiple installations.

SUS304 Stainless Steel — Why the Material Specification Matters

Not all stainless steel is equal. SUS304 — the grade used throughout this unit — is the industry standard for commercial drinking water contact surfaces in Australia for good reason. Its chromium-nickel alloy composition forms a self-renewing passive oxide layer that:

Resists corrosion in the humid, condensation-prone environments typical of indoor commercial spaces — and in coastal locations where salt air accelerates deterioration of lower-grade metals
Withstands repeated cleaning with commercial disinfectants, bleach solutions, and sanitisers without surface degradation
Remains hygienic — SUS304's non-porous surface does not harbour bacteria, cannot absorb odours, and does not require painting or sealing
Resists vandalism and impact — commercial-grade SUS304 sheet construction withstands the physical demands of high-traffic environments including schools and public gyms far better than plastic, fibreglass, or powder-coated alternatives

Powder-coated steel chips. Plastic yellows, cracks, and harbours bacteria in surface scratches. SUS304 stainless simply does not age in the same way — a properly maintained unit has a realistic service life of 10–15 years .

Inline Filtration — Chilled and Clean, Not Just Chilled

The bubbler does not simply chill mains water. It filters it first. An inline sediment and carbon cartridge filtration system removes chlorine, taste, odour, fine particulates, and common chemical contaminants before the water is chilled and dispensed. For facilities on town water supplies that use chloramine — including those served by Sydney Water, Melbourne Water, SA Water, Urban Utilities, and Icon Water — this makes a tangible difference to the palatability of the water and, by extension, to how frequently occupants actually drink from the unit.

Filtered, chilled water from a bubbler is also a practical alternative to single-use plastic bottles — supporting school sustainability programs, gym environmental policies, and corporate ESG commitments.

Chilling Performance

The unit provides a chilling capacity of 20 litres per hour , maintaining dispensed water at 8–12°C — the optimal temperature range for refreshing, palatable drinking water. For facilities with peak occupancy above 50 people during concentrated periods (school breaks, gym class changeovers, lunch rushes), consider installing multiple units or supplementing with the direct-connect hot & cold water cooler in high-demand zones.

Two Faucets — Bubbler Head and Bottle Fill

The unit includes two dispensing points : a traditional upward-arc bubbler head for direct drinking, and a separate tap for filling cups and reusable water bottles. In any commercial environment — but especially in schools and gyms — this dual-faucet configuration is essential. A single bubbler head creates a bottleneck when users need to fill bottles, and a queue at a bubbler discourages hydration. Two points of access eliminates the problem.

Integrated Drip Tray and Drainage

The stainless steel basin and drip tray beneath the dispenser heads captures overspray and drips, channelling water to the waste outlet rather than pooling on the floor beneath the unit. This is a hygiene and safety specification — a dry floor around a commercial bubbler in a school corridor or gym is a non-negotiable requirement. The basin is fully stainless, easy to wipe down, and resists the limescale build-up that makes plastic trays unsightly within months.

Concealed Plumbing

Cold water supply and waste connections are concealed within the unit — no exposed pipework on the wall face. This matters in client-facing environments (offices, reception areas, healthcare facilities) and in school environments where exposed plumbing creates tampering risk. The clean wall presentation is part of what makes this unit appropriate for premium commercial fit-outs.

Specifications

Specification Detail

Construction SUS304 grade stainless steel throughout
Profile Square — wall-mount
Chilling capacity 20 litres per hour
Water temperature 8–12°C (dispensed)
Faucets 2 — bubbler head + bottle/cup fill tap
Filtration Inline sediment + carbon cartridge
Cartridge replacement Every 6–12 months depending on usage and water quality
Basin/drip tray Integrated stainless steel with drainage outlet
Plumbing Concealed cold water supply and waste connections
Certification WaterMark certified to AS/NZS 3497
Installation By licensed plumber — certificate of compliance issuable
Suitable for Schools, gyms, offices, hospitals, aged care, sporting clubs, commercial buildings
Service life 10–15 years with regular filter replacement and maintenance

Suitable Environments

Schools: Meets NCC drinking water access ratios (1 facility per 50 occupants), WaterMark certified for licensed plumber installation, certificate of compliance issuable. Push-button or lever activation suits all age groups. Filtered chilled water encourages hydration and reduces plastic bottle waste.
Gyms and fitness centres: 20L/hr chilling capacity handles concentrated peak demand around class times. Two-faucet design — bubbler head plus bottle fill — eliminates queuing. SUS304 withstands high-humidity environments and heavy-duty cleaning regimes.
Offices and commercial workplaces: Square profile and satin stainless finish integrates with contemporary fit-outs. Concealed plumbing presents cleanly in client-facing areas. Direct mains connection eliminates bottled water delivery costs — payback typically within 12–18 months versus ongoing bottle delivery spend.
Healthcare and aged care: Non-porous hygienic surface, no plastic components at water contact points, WaterMark certified materials. Push-button activation accessible to most residents and patients.

Maintenance

Filter cartridges require replacement every 6–12 months depending on facility usage volume and source water quality. High-traffic schools and gyms with many daily users should plan for 6-monthly replacement as part of routine facilities maintenance. Replacement is tool-free on most cartridge formats and takes under five minutes. The stainless steel basin and exterior require only standard commercial surface cleaning — no painting, sealing, or specialised treatment.

Replacement cartridges are available directly from Enviro Aqua, shipped Australia-wide.

Installation

All commercial bubbler installations must be carried out by a licensed plumber . Installation involves cold water supply connection, waste/drainage connection, and wall mounting. In most Australian states, a certificate of compliance is required on completion of commercial plumbing work — only possible with a WaterMark certified product. Enviro Aqua ships Australia-wide; units can be delivered direct to site for your plumber.

Wholesale and Project Pricing

Wholesale pricing is available for schools, councils, educational authorities, gym chains, commercial developers, and any multi-unit order. Please contact us to discuss your project requirements. We supply Australia-wide.

The first two stages feature a 5-micron sediment filter to trap dirt, rust, and sand, followed by a 5-micron carbon block filter to remove chlorine, odours, and organic impurities. The third stage is an alkaline filter, which enhances water with essential minerals and raises pH levels for a smoother, healthier hydration experience.

Designed for both tank and mains water supplies, this system includes all fittings, a stylish stainless steel faucet, and a comprehensive DIY installation kit, making it easy to upgrade your home’s water quality.

Triple Water Filter System with 1/4" Ports
5-Micron Sediment Filter – Captures dirt, rust, sand, and debris

products.title: Under Sink Water Filter | 4 Stage | Reverse Osmosis System
products.short_description: Four-stage under-sink reverse osmosis system delivering ultra-pure drinking water with 0.0001-micron RO membrane filtration. Combines PP sediment, granular carbon, T33 post-carbon polish, and TFC RO membrane stages. Includes 12-litre storage tank, stainless steel dedicated drinking faucet, and all installation hardware. Removes 99% of dissolved solids, heavy metals, salts, and over 1,000 other contaminants.
products.description:
## Why 4-stage RO is the residential sweet spot

Four-stage systems hit the right balance of filtration quality, cost, and cartridge replacement frequency for typical Australian household water. They remove essentially everything you'd want removed from your drinking water without the added cost and complexity of mineral remineralisation stages that some users don't need.

If you're on city water and want clean, pure drinking water without the cost of bottled water service, a 4-stage RO system is usually all you need. If you want alkaline mineralised output too, our 6-stage system adds that.

## Stage-by-stage breakdown

**Stage 1 — PP Spun Sediment Filter (5-micron):** Captures particles, dust, mud, and sediment that would otherwise damage the more expensive downstream stages. First-line defence for the whole system.

**Stage 2 — Granular Carbon Filter:** Removes chlorine, organics, turbidity, and odours. Critical: the RO membrane in stage 4 is destroyed by chlorine, so this stage protects it.

**Stage 3 — T33 Post-Carbon Filter:** Polishes the water to remove any residual odours or impurities, delivering crisp, refreshing water. Acts as both pre- and post-treatment depending on system flow direction.

**Stage 4 — TFC Reverse Osmosis Membrane:** The heart of the system. 0.0001-micron filtration removes 99% of total dissolved solids (TDS), heavy metals (arsenic, mercury, lead), fluoride, salts, and over 1,000 other dissolved contaminants — including microplastics down to molecular size.

## What's in the box

- 4-stage water filter system housing assembly (with 1/4" ports)
- 5-micron PP sediment filter (pre-installed)
- 5-micron carbon block filter (pre-installed)
- T33 post-carbon polishing filter (pre-installed)
- TFC RO membrane (pre-installed)
- 12-litre pressurised storage tank
- Stainless steel dedicated drinking faucet
- Opening spanners (10" housing spanner + RO membrane spanner)
- 1/2" threaded water inlet block and shut-off valve
- 2 metres of 1/4" white tubing
- Drain saddle clamp
- Installation hardware and instructions

## Specifications

- **Stages:** 4 (sediment / carbon block / T33 / RO)
- **RO membrane:** TFC, 0.0001-micron precision
- **TDS reduction:** Up to 99%
- **Storage tank:** 12 litres pressurised
- **Tubing:** 1/4" (standard RO size)
- **Water inlet:** 1/2" threaded
- **Tap:** Stainless steel dedicated drinking faucet (included)
- **Cartridge replacement:** Stages 1-3 every 6-12 months; membrane every 2-3 years

## What it removes

- **Heavy metals:** Lead, mercury, arsenic, chromium, copper, cadmium
- **Dissolved solids:** Up to 99% of TDS
- **Salts:** Sodium, chloride, sulphates
- **Fluoride:** Up to 95% reduction
- **Chlorine and chloramines:** 99%+
- **Pesticides and herbicides:** Most removed
- **Bacteria, parasites, viruses:** Physical exclusion at 0.0001-micron
- **Microplastics:** Removed
- **Pharmaceutical residues:** Most removed

## Installation

Installation typically takes 1-2 hours and is achievable for confident DIYers, or takes any licensed plumber under an hour. The system mounts inside the cabinet under your sink. The dedicated drinking tap installs in an existing soap-dispenser hole or a newly-drilled hole in the sink/benchtop. The drain saddle connects to your existing waste line for the brine drain (RO systems produce a small amount of brine wastewater as a normal part of their operation).

## Replacement cartridges

We stock all replacement cartridges and offer set bundles for the annual change-out. Subscribe to our reminder service and we'll email you when each stage is due for replacement based on your install date.

products.description:
The Five-Stage Undersink Reverse Osmosis (RO) Water Filtration System with 10-Gallon Storage Tank offers a premium solution for clean, safe, and great-tasting water in your home. Designed to handle a wide range of contaminants, this system combines advanced filtration technology with a high-capacity storage tank, ensuring a steady supply of purified water for drinking, cooking, and other household needs.

Each of the five filtration stages serves a critical purpose in delivering water of the highest quality. From removing sediment and chlorine to reducing heavy metals and polishing the water for refined taste, this system is designed for ultimate performance and convenience.

Stages of Filtration:

products.title: Under Sink Water Filter | 6 Stage | Reverse Osmosis System
products.short_description: Six-stage under-sink reverse osmosis system with alkaline mineral remineralisation — delivering bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Combines PP sediment, GAC, carbon block, TFC RO membrane, post-carbon polish, and an alkaline mineral stage that restores beneficial minerals and raises pH after the RO membrane has stripped them. Includes 10-litre storage tank for instant delivery.
products.description:
## What 6-stage RO actually does

Standard 4 and 5-stage RO systems remove contaminants but produce slightly acidic, demineralised water — pure but flat-tasting. The 6-stage system adds an alkaline mineral cartridge as the final stage, restoring calcium, magnesium, and trace minerals while raising pH back toward neutral. The result tastes noticeably better than RO-only output and is closer to high-end bottled water in mineral profile.

## Stage-by-stage breakdown

**Stage 1 — PP Spun Sediment Filter (5-micron):** Captures sand, dirt, and sediment to protect downstream filters and improve overall system efficiency. First line of defence.

**Stage 2 — Granular Activated Carbon (GAC):** Removes free chlorine, organics, and fine particulates. Critical for protecting the RO membrane — chlorine destroys TFC membranes if it reaches them.

**Stage 3 — Carbon Block (CTO):** Further reduces chlorine, chloramines, taste, and odour. Catches anything the GAC missed and provides backup protection for the membrane.

**Stage 4 — TFC Reverse Osmosis Membrane:** The heart of the system. Filters out 99% of total dissolved solids (TDS), heavy metals, arsenic, mercury, fluoride, and over 1,000 other contaminants down to 0.0001-micron precision.

**Stage 5 — Post-Carbon Polish (T33):** Acid-washed coconut carbon that polishes the water for a smooth, refined taste before delivery.

**Stage 6 — Alkaline Mineral Cartridge:** Restores calcium, magnesium, and trace minerals; raises pH to 8.0-9.0; and improves the mouth-feel and taste of the final water.

## What's in the box

- 6-stage filter system housing assembly (with 1/4" ports)
- PP spun sediment filter (5-micron, pre-installed)
- GAC granular carbon filter (pre-installed)
- CTO carbon block filter (pre-installed)
- TFC RO membrane (pre-installed)
- T33 post-carbon polishing filter (pre-installed)
- Alkaline mineral cartridge (pre-installed)
- 10-litre pressurised storage tank
- Stainless steel dedicated drinking faucet
- 1/2" threaded water inlet block and shut-off valve
- 2 metres of 1/4" tubing
- Drain saddle clamp for waste connection
- Installation hardware and instructions

## Specifications

- **Stages:** 6 (sediment / GAC / CTO / RO / post-carbon / alkaline)
- **RO membrane:** TFC, 0.0001-micron
- **TDS reduction:** Up to 99%
- **Storage tank:** 10 litres pressurised
- **Tubing:** 1/4" (standard RO size)
- **Inlet:** 1/2" threaded
- **Tap:** Stainless steel dedicated drinking faucet (included)
- **Cartridge replacement:** Stages 1-3 every 6-12 months; membrane every 2-3 years; alkaline every 12-18 months

## Installation

Installation typically takes 1-2 hours and is achievable for confident DIYers, or takes any licensed plumber under an hour. The system mounts inside the cabinet under your sink. The dedicated drinking tap installs in an existing soap-dispenser hole or a newly-drilled hole in the sink/benchtop. The drain saddle connects to your existing waste line for the brine drain.

## Replacement cartridges

We stock all replacement cartridges and offer set bundles for the annual change-out. Subscribe to our reminder service and we'll email you when each stage is due for replacement based on your install date.

products.title: Twin Pair of Water Filter Cartridges – Premium Carbon (CTO) + Sediment (PP) – 10″ x 2.5″ – 5 Micron
products.short_description:
Twin Undersink Replacement Filters PP+CTO Standard Size 10''x2.5'' Inc
When buying filters the 3 main aspect you need to block out are:

1. Sediment, Dirt, & Rust
2. Chemicals, Chlorine, Organics , Taste, & Odour
3. Giardia (Cysts)

Giardia needs to be filtered out through 5 micron filtration. In the past, the only method of doing this was to buy expensive 5 micron carbon filters. We are happy to say that we now offer a much cheaper alternative, which is the 5 micron Sediment Filter. The 0.5 micron sediment filter effectively reduces Giardia, thus allowing you to purchase any micron rating Carbon Filters, because regardless of the micron rating they will ALL extract the chemical elements.
products.description:
Twin Undersink Replacement Filters PP+CTO Standard Size 10''x2.5'' Inc
When buying filters the 3 main aspect you need to block out are:

1. Sediment, Dirt, & Rust
2. Chemicals, Chlorine, Organics , Taste, & Odour
3. Giardia (Cysts)

Giardia needs to be filtered out through 5 micron filtration. In the past, the only method of doing this was to buy expensive 5 micron carbon filters. We are happy to say that we now offer a much cheaper alternative, which is the 5 micron Sediment Filter. The 0.5 micron sediment filter effectively reduces Giardia, thus allowing you to purchase any micron rating Carbon Filters, because regardless of the micron rating they will ALL extract the chemical elements.
Polypropylene Spun Sediment Filter - 5 Micron
These economical "HPF" PERFORMANCE sediment cartridges are constructed from polypropylene which is spun and melted simultaneously. This technique means there is no centre core to restrict filter performance. The "HPF" series of sediment filters are compatible with most liquids and are highly effective for sediment, rust, sand, silt, and algae removal. "HPF" performance sediment filters have no chemical residuals. They are extremely high performing , carry a heavy load of sediment before requiring replacement. We choose to use these sediment filters over all other types due to the high performance , high flow rate, high load capacity, and there inability to grow bacterial slime. Suitable for filtering cooking oil.
Pure 100% Coconut Carbon Block Water Filter - 5 Micron
The perfect carbon block filter is made from 100% Coconut Shell Carbon, which creates what many believe to be sweeter tasting water. The unique pore structure of this carbon is well suited for chemical adsorption, including VOC’s, while reducing chlorine and chemicals that contribute to taste and odour. This high quality 100% Coconut Carbon filter is the exact filter we use as our front line carbon filter. As a rule it is difficult to find 100% coconut carbon filters. Most lower priced filters on the market are a blend of coconut carbon and coal based carbon. The problem with coal based carbon is that it has a shorter life and often results in a less palatable flavour. We use this 100% coconut carbon filter in all of our pre-assembled kits. These are top of the range HIGH QUALITY coconut carbon block filters are ideal for taste and odour issues, and perfect for total extraction of town water chemicals. TOP OF THE RANGE 100% coconut carbon, this particular filter is currently supplied throughout the European market as a premium drinking water filter. As the Exclusive importer to Australia, we are in a prime position to offer you this high quality filter at rock bottom prices, direct from importer to the public.

products.title: Water Filter Replacement Set | Standard | 6 Stages | 5 Micron | 10"
products.short_description:
Maintain the optimal performance of your 6-stage reverse osmosis water filtration system with this complete replacement cartridge set. Designed to effectively remove impurities and enhance water quality, this set ensures you continue to enjoy fresh and safe drinking water.
Package Includes:

1 x Sediment Filter (5 Micron)

1 x Granular Activated Carbon (GAC) Filter

1 x Carbon Block Filter

1 x Reverse Osmosis Membrane

1 x Post Carbon Filter

1 x Alkaline Filter

Note: It's recommended to replace RO filters every 6-12 months, depending on water quality and usage, to maintain optimal performance.

products.title: 3 Way Filtered Kitchen Tap for RO Water Filters - Mixer in Black, Nickel, Gold, and Chrome
products.short_description: Transform your kitchen with this sophisticated 3-way water filter tap, available in five luxurious finishes: Matte Black, Brushed Gold, Shiny Gold, Brushed Nickel and Polished Chrome. Engineered for both functionality and style, this versatile faucet delivers hot, cold, and filtered water from a single, sleek design. Say goodbye to cluttered countertops—easily connect your water filtration system without the need for drilling an extra hole. Whether you’re pouring a glass of fresh, filtered water or filling a pot for cooking, this tap blends effortless convenience with timeless elegance, making it the perfect centrepiece for any modern kitchen.
products.description:
Transform your kitchen with this sophisticated 3-way water filter tap, available in five luxurious finishes: Matte Black, Brushed Gold, Shiny Gold, Brushed Nickel and Polished Chrome. This product is WELS-rated (4-star) and WaterMark-certified, meeting Australian standards for water efficiency (AS/NZS 6400:2016) and plumbing compliance (AS/NZS 3718).

products.title: Complete Bathroom Package 1B | Matte Black | Watermark Certified | WELS Rated
products.short_description:
Redefine your bathroom with a professionally curated set of premium, WaterMark-certified essentials—designed for clean aesthetics, functional reliability, and long-term value. This all-in-one solution eliminates the hassle of sourcing individual components, ensuring consistent design, effortless installation, and unmatched durability across every detail of your bathroom space. Package Includes

Basin Tap – Sleek, modern, watermark certified and WELS 4 star rated. Shower Set – Full-coverage rainfall head and hand shower, watermark certified and WELS 4 star rated. Clothes Hook – Minimalist wall hook with robust matte black finish.
products.description:
Redefine your bathroom with a professionally curated set of premium, WaterMark-certified essentials—designed for clean aesthetics, functional reliability, and long-term value.
This all-in-one solution eliminates the hassle of sourcing individual components, ensuring consistent design, effortless installation, and unmatched durability across every detail of your bathroom space.

Package Includes

Basin Tap – Sleek, modern, watermark certified and WELS 4 star rated.
Shower Set – Full-coverage rainfall head and hand shower, watermark certified and WELS 4 star rated.
Clothes Hook – Minimalist wall hook with robust matte black finish.
Bath Towel Rail – Extended rail to accommodate full-sized towels.
Hand Towel Rail – Compact yet sturdy for optimised wall space.
Basin Drain Plug – Luxury, corrosion-resistant build.
Floor Drain Plug – Flush-fitting with high flow rate capacity.
Toilet Roll Holder – Precision-fit arm with anti-slip hook.
Rimless Toilet Suite – Hygienic, soft-close, back to wall toilet, watermark certified and WELS 4 star rated.
Toilet Brush Holder – Wall-mounted, modern design for discreet hygiene.

WELS Details:

[1] Basin Tap :
- Star Rating: 4 Stars
- Flow Rate: 7.5 L/min
- Registration Number: T30756
[2] Overhead Shower:
- Star Rating: 3 Stars
- Flow Rate: 9 L/min
- Registration Number: S16794

Please note the hand shower is not WELS rated, only the overhead.

[9] Rimless Toilet Suite :
- Star Rating: 4 Stars
- Flow Rate: 4.5/3L Flush
- Registration Number: L07489

products.title: WM 3 Stages 20" x 4.5" Triple Big Blue Whole House Water Filter System
products.short_description: Clean, filtered water from every tap, every shower, every appliance in your home — this is the only whole house water filter system you'll ever need to install. The Enviro Aqua Premium Three Stage Big Blue Whole House Water Filter System is WaterMark certified to AS/NZS 3497 , built from 304 stainless steel, and engineered to handle the full water demand of an Australian family home without any drop in pressure. This is not a portable bench top unit or a basic inline filter.
products.description:
Clean, filtered water from every tap, every shower, every appliance in your home — this is the only whole house water filter system you'll ever need to install. The Enviro Aqua Premium Three Stage Big Blue Whole House Water Filter System is WaterMark certified to AS/NZS 3497 , built from 304 stainless steel, and engineered to handle the full water demand of an Australian family home without any drop in pressure.

This is not a portable bench top unit or a basic inline filter. This is a permanent, mains-connected whole-home filtration system that a licensed plumber installs once on your main water supply line — and then every litre of water entering your home is filtered before it reaches a single tap.
Why This System
1. WaterMark Certified — The Only System Your Plumber Can Legally Install
Under the Plumbing Code of Australia, any water filter permanently connected to a mains water line must carry WaterMark certification . This system does. A licensed plumber can legally install it on your main supply line, issue a certificate of compliance, and your installation is fully covered. Most cheaper systems sold online are not WaterMark certified — your plumber cannot legally install them on a mains line, and your home insurance may not cover you if they fail.
2. Big Blue 20″ × 4.5″ — No Pressure Drop, Longer Cartridge Life
"Big Blue" refers to the 4.5″ diameter filter housings — nearly four times the filter media volume of standard 2.5″ housings. This matters in two critical ways. First, water flows through at up to 75 litres per minute with no perceptible pressure loss, even when multiple showers, taps, and appliances run simultaneously. Second, the larger volume of filter media means cartridges last significantly longer before replacement, reducing your annual running costs. Three 20″ × 4.5″ housings with 1″ BSP brass inlet and outlet ports — the correct size for Australian mains supply lines — complete the package.
3. 304 Stainless Steel Enclosure — Built for Australian Conditions
The 304-grade stainless steel enclosure isn't just about looks — though it does look sharp. It is specifically engineered for Australian outdoor and garage installations. 304 stainless is UV-resistant, salt-air resistant, and corrosion-proof : the chromium-nickel alloy forms a self-renewing protective layer that resists the coastal humidity, summer heat, and UV exposure that corrode powder-coated steel and degrade plastic components over time. If you're in a coastal or high-humidity location, this matters enormously. It's also tamper-resistant, protects the filter housings from physical damage, and presents cleanly on an external wall or in a visible garage location.
Three-Stage Filtration — What Each Stage Does
Stage 1 — Sediment Pre-Filter (5 Micron)
The first stage captures sediment, rust, sand, silt, and suspended particles down to 5 microns. This is the workhorse stage — it intercepts the physical debris in your water supply before it can clog the more specialised carbon stages downstream. Protecting the carbon stages from sediment load is what makes a three-stage system significantly more effective and longer-lasting than a two-stage system with carbon alone.
Stage 2 — Carbon Filtration (Chlorine, Chloramine, Taste & Odour)
The second stage uses a granular activated carbon (GAC) or catalytic carbon cartridge to remove chlorine, chloramines, taste, odour, trihalomethanes (THMs), and a broad range of chemical contaminants. If your water supply uses chloramine — which includes Sydney Water, Melbourne Water, SA Water, Urban Utilities (Brisbane/SEQ), and Icon Water (Canberra) — specify a catalytic carbon cartridge for Stage 2. Standard GAC carbon cannot reliably remove chloramine at whole-house flow rates; catalytic carbon can, and the 20″ × 4.5″ housing provides the contact time needed for it to work effectively.
Stage 3 — Carbon Block Polish (Fine Contaminants & Heavy Metals)
The third stage uses a carbon block cartridge for final polishing — capturing any remaining fine particles, residual chemical contaminants, heavy metals including lead and copper, and cysts. Carbon block's dense structure provides longer contact time and finer filtration than GAC, making it the ideal finishing stage. For households with PFAS concerns , a high-grade carbon block in Stage 3 provides meaningful reduction of longer-chain PFAS compounds (PFOS, PFOA) from the whole-home supply.
Pressure Gauges — Know Exactly When to Change Your Filters
This system includes pressure gauges that monitor incoming and outgoing water pressure. As cartridges accumulate contaminants, the pressure differential between inlet and outlet increases — giving you a clear, objective signal that a cartridge change is due. No guessing, no unnecessary early replacement, no waiting until the filters are overloaded. It's a feature that cheaper systems don't include, and over the life of the system it saves you money and ensures your water quality never quietly degrades.
Specifications

Specification
Detail

Housing size
20″ × 4.5″ (Big Blue) — 3 stages

Flow rate
Up to 75 litres per minute

Inlet / Outlet ports
1″ BSP brass (heavy-duty, full-flow)

Enclosure material
304 stainless steel — UV, corrosion & tamper resistant

Housing seal
Double O-ring for leak-free performance

Pressure gauges
Included — monitors filter life objectively

Certification
WaterMark certified to AS/NZS 3497

Suitable for
Mains/town water, rainwater tanks, bore water (with appropriate cartridges)

Installation
By licensed plumber — certificate of compliance issuable

Cartridge compatibility
Standard 20″ × 4.5″ Big Blue — widely available

What's Included

3 × Big Blue 20″ × 4.5″ filter housings with 304 stainless steel enclosure & frame
Stainless steel mounting bracket
3 × filter cartridges (sediment + carbon stages)
Pressure gauges
Housing removal wrench
Spare O-rings

Configure for Your Water Supply
The Big Blue format accepts any standard 20″ × 4.5″ cartridge — widely available from Enviro Aqua. Configure for your water source:

Town water with chlorine: Sediment (5µm) → GAC carbon → Carbon block
Town water with chloramine (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Adelaide, Canberra): Sediment (5µm) → Catalytic carbon → Carbon block
Rainwater tank: Sediment (1–5µm) → Carbon block → Sub-micron or UV stage
PFAS concerns: Sediment → Catalytic carbon → High-grade carbon block

Not sure which configuration suits your area? Contact us and we'll recommend the right cartridge set for your water supply.
WaterMark Certification — What It Means for You
WaterMark certification (AS/NZS 3497), administered by the Australian Building Codes Board (ABCB), confirms this system has been independently tested for structural integrity under Australian mains water pressure, verified to use materials that will not leach contaminants into your drinking water, and assessed for correct fittings and pressure ratings. The manufacturing facility undergoes ongoing annual auditing as a condition of maintaining certification.

For you, this means three things: your licensed plumber can legally install this system and issue a certificate of compliance; your installation is covered under your home insurance; and if anything goes wrong, you have the backing of a certified, audited product. Verify this system on the official ABCB WaterMark Product Database .
Installation
Installed on your main cold water supply line — typically at the point where the mains enters your home, in a garage, under the house, or at the water metre. Installation must be carried out by a licensed plumber (required under Australian plumbing law for any mains connection). We recommend asking your plumber to add isolation valves and a bypass on either side of the system — this allows you to service the filters without cutting water to the whole house.

Central Coast NSW customers: we offer professional whole house filter installation by licensed plumbers on the Central Coast .
Ongoing Maintenance
Replace cartridges every 6–12 months depending on your water quality and household usage. The pressure gauges take the guesswork out of timing — a rising pressure differential tells you a cartridge change is due before water quality is affected. Big Blue 20″ × 4.5″ cartridges last considerably longer than standard 2.5″ cartridges, keeping annual running costs to approximately $120–$220 per year . Replacement cartridges are available directly from Enviro Aqua, shipped Australia-wide.

products.description:
Quality plumbing fitting for water filtration systems, reverse osmosis installations, and standard 1/4" tubing. Suitable for connecting filter housings, RO membranes, holding tanks, and dedicated drinking taps. Stocked locally in Sydney for next-day Australian dispatch.

Quality fittings are critical to the long-term reliability of any water filtration system. Push-fit connections make installation tool-free, but require quality components to maintain a leak-free seal under pressure. All Enviro Aqua fittings are pressure-tested and rated for use with reverse osmosis systems and drinking water applications. Standard 1/4" sizing is compatible with virtually every residential RO and water filter system on the Australian market.

## Why buy from Enviro Aqua

Enviro Aqua is an Australian-owned water filtration specialist based on the NSW Central Coast. We supply residential, commercial, and industrial water treatment products across Australia — with local warehousing for fast dispatch, Australian-standards-compliant products, and direct support from our team if you need help choosing the right system. Where applicable, our products carry WaterMark and WELS certification for full compliance with Australian plumbing standards. Free shipping on orders over $99 within Australia.

products.description:
Polypropylene sediment cartridge that captures dirt, sand, rust, and suspended particles before they reach finer filtration stages or your appliances. Compatible with standard housings used across major water filter brands.

Replacement frequency depends on your water quality and usage. Most household applications see 6 to 12 months of service life from each cartridge, though high-sediment water or high-flow households may require more frequent changes. Always flush new cartridges before drinking the first batch of water.

products.title: Commercial reverses osmosis RO 500LPH water treatment machinery equipment
products.short_description: Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.
products.description:
Under-sink reverse osmosis system that delivers bottled-water-quality drinking water from your kitchen tap. Includes filter housings, mounting hardware, and fittings ready for standard kitchen installation.

Reverse osmosis works by forcing water through a semi-permeable membrane that filters contaminants down to molecular level — removing dissolved salts, heavy metals, fluoride, chlorine byproducts, pesticides, and a wide spectrum of other contaminants that conventional filtration leaves behind. The result is water comparable to premium bottled water, delivered on demand from your kitchen tap. RO systems require a dedicated drinking tap (included or available separately) and produce a small amount of brine wastewater as part of normal operation.

Installation typically takes 1 to 2 hours and can be DIY for those comfortable with basic plumbing, or carried out by any licensed plumber. The system mounts inside the cabinet under your sink, with the dedicated drinking tap installed in an existing or newly-drilled hole in your sink or benchtop. A drain saddle clamp connects to the existing waste line for the brine drain.

## Why buy from Enviro Aqua

Enviro Aqua is an Australian-owned water filtration specialist based on the NSW Central Coast. We supply residential, commercial, and industrial water treatment products across Australia — with local warehousing for fast dispatch, Australian-standards-compliant products, and direct support from our team if you need help choosing the right system. Where applicable, our products carry WaterMark and WELS certification for full compliance with Australian plumbing standards. Free shipping on orders over $99 within Australia.

products.title: 3 Stages Whole House Water Filter and UV Ultraviolet Sterilization System
products.short_description: UV water steriliser that uses ultraviolet light to destroy 99.99% of bacteria, viruses, and waterborne pathogens — without chemicals, additives, or chlorine taste. Ideal as a final-stage steriliser after sediment and carbon filtration, or for tank water, rainwater, and bore water systems.
products.description:
UV water steriliser that uses ultraviolet light to destroy 99.99% of bacteria, viruses, and waterborne pathogens — without chemicals, additives, or chlorine taste. Ideal as a final-stage steriliser after sediment and carbon filtration, or for tank water, rainwater, and bore water systems.

Ultraviolet sterilisation works by exposing water to UV-C light at a wavelength of 254nm. This wavelength damages the DNA of bacteria, viruses, and protozoa, rendering them unable to reproduce — effectively killing them without introducing any chemicals or altering the taste of your water. UV sterilisation is particularly valuable for rainwater, bore water, and any water source where biological contamination is a concern. The unit should be installed after sediment and carbon filtration stages, as UV cannot penetrate water with high turbidity.

Install after sediment and carbon filtration stages — never directly on incoming water with high turbidity, as UV cannot penetrate cloudy water effectively. Mount the unit horizontally or vertically per manufacturer specifications, ensure proper electrical connection, and replace the UV lamp annually for full sterilisation efficacy.

Big Blue whole-house water filtration system designed to treat every tap, shower, and water-using appliance in your home from a single point of entry. Built with quality housings, mounting brackets, and Australian-standard fittings.

Whole-house filtration is installed at the point where mains water enters your home, treating every drop of water your house uses — drinking, showering, washing, and feeding into appliances. The benefit is comprehensive: protected plumbing, longer-lasting hot water systems and washing machines, chlorine-free showers, and consistent quality at every tap. Installation requires a licensed plumber and typically involves cutting into the main water line, installing a bypass valve, and mounting the filter housings on a stable wall location.

Installation should be carried out by a licensed plumber. The system mounts to a stable wall surface near the point where mains water enters your home, with a bypass valve allowing the filtration to be isolated for cartridge changes. Direct-connect water coolers eliminate the cost, waste, and labour of bottled water service.
